subcategory: Responsive landing page hero with navigation
use_cases: Landing page header section for space or travel industry websites
Hero banner for SaaS product introduction pages
Brand presentation section with multiple CTA buttons
Full-width responsive header combining navigation and promotional content
Partner showcase section integrated with hero content
ai_summary: A responsive hero banner component featuring navigation links, a background image, animated badge text, dual CTA buttons, and partner logos. Designed for landing pages in the space, travel, or SaaS industries with a dark space-themed aesthetic and clean typography hierarchy. Includes mobile-responsive layout with proper spacing and visual hierarchy for brand presentations and conversion-focused hero sections.
